intro: Afromendoncia floribunda, also known as African bloodroot or Borreria floribunda, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties.
